zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda of Andechs於1160年出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 斯塔恩格安德斯時，她的父親Duque Berthold III von Andechs-Meranien38歲，母親Hedwig von Scheyern-Dachau Wittelsbach38歲。她於大約1184年與Engelbert III Von Görz在奧地利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1245年1月17日在義大利福利福利 維其亞 朱莉婭格拉迪斯卡享年85歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda of Andechs于1160年出生在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 斯塔恩格安德斯时，她的父亲Duque Berthold III von Andechs-Meranien38岁，母亲Hedwig von Scheyern-Dachau Wittelsbach38岁。她于大约1184年与Engelbert III Von Görz在奥地利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1245年1月17日在意大利福利福利 維其亞 朱莉婭格拉迪斯卡享年85岁。

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda of Andechs was born in 1160, in Andechs, Starnberg, Bavaria, Germany, her father, Duque Berthold III von Andechs-Meranien, was 38 and her mother, Hedwig von Scheyern-Dachau Wittelsbach, was 38. She married Engelbert III Von Görz about 1184, in Austria. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 17 January 1245, in Gradisca, Friuli Venezia Giulia, Italy, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda of Andechs est née en 1160, à Andechs, Landkreis Starnberg, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Duque Berthold III von Andechs-Meranien, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Hedwig von Scheyern-Dachau Wittelsbach, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Engelbert III Von Görz environ 1184, à Autriche. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 17 janvier 1245, à Gradisca, Friuli Venezia Giulia, Italie, à l’âge de 85 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda of Andechs 1160 in Andechs, Landkreis Starnberg, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Duque Berthold III von Andechs-Meranien 38 und ihre Mutter Hedwig von Scheyern-Dachau Wittelsbach 38. Sie hat um 1184 in Österreich Engelbert III Von Görz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 17. Januar 1245 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Gradisca, Friaul-Julisch Venetien, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda of Andechs è nata il nel 1160 nel Andechs, Landkreis Starnberg, Bayern, Germania, sua padre, Duque Berthold III von Andechs-Meranien, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Hedwig von Scheyern-Dachau Wittelsbach, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Engelbert III Von Görz circa 1184, nel Austria. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 17 gennaio 1245, nel Gradisca, Friuli Venezia Giulia, Italia, all'età di 85 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda of Andechsが1160年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス スターンバーグアンデチスで生まれた時，父Duque Berthold III von Andechs-Meranienは38歳，母Hedwig von Scheyern-Dachau Wittelsbachは38歳であった。約1184年にオーストリアでEngelbert III Von Görzと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1245年1月17日にイタリアフリウリ ベンエズア ギウリアグラディスカで85歳で死去した。

ko.of,,Aquileja,Friuli-Venezia-,Italy: 이탈리아 프리우리 븐지아 주리야 우딘 아키e이아
ko.lifeSummary: Matilda of Andechs(이)가 1160년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 스타른버그 앤데크스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Duque Berthold III von Andechs-Meranien(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hedwig von Scheyern-Dachau Wittelsbach(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 대략 1184년 오스트리아에서 Engelbert III Von Görz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1245년 1월 17일 이탈리아 프리우리 븐지아 주리야 그라디스카에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda of Andechs nasceu em 1160, em Andechs, Landkreis Starnberg, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Duque Berthold III von Andechs-Meranien, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Hedwig von Scheyern-Dachau Wittelsbach, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Engelbert III Von Görz aproximadamente 1184, em Áustria. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 17 de janeiro de 1245, em Gradisca, Friuli Venezia Giulia, Itália, com 85 anos.

ru.of,,Aquileja,Friuli-Venezia-,Italy: акуилeя, удаин, фрюли винезя гюля, Италия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda of Andechs родилась в 1160 г. в местности андечс, ландкрис старнбирг, беиирн, Германия, её отцу по имени Duque Berthold III von Andechs-Meranien было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Hedwig von Scheyern-Dachau Wittelsbach, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Engelbert III Von Görz около 1184 г. в местности Австрия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 17 января 1245 г. в местности градиска, фрюли винезя гюля, Италия в возрасте 85 лет.

Se casó con Engelbert III Von Görz aproximadamente 1184, en Austria. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 17 de enero de 1245, en Gradisca, Friuli Venezia Giulia, Italia, a la edad de 85 años.
